description: PassBy provides retail market intelligence based on foot traffic, spend, and related datasets for retailers’ real estate, operations, and marketing teams. Its products include the Almanac analytics platform and AI-assisted access to that intelligence through ChatGPT, Copilot, and other agentic interfaces.
summary: PassBy exposes a documented Foot Traffic API surface (details not publicly specified) and a known OAuth-protected MCP server at https://openai-app.passby.com/mcp for Almanac/agentic access.
